summary: Tested 6 new features: Spare Parts CRUD, Vehicle Photos, Legal Documents, Marketing Sync, Finance page. Fixed critical bug: app.include_router(api_router) was placed BEFORE new route definitions, causing all new endpoints to return 404. Moved include_router to end of file. All 13 backend tests now pass. All UI features working as expected.

critical.issue: app.include_router(api_router) was at line 1041, but all new routes were defined AFTER it (lines 1049-1259). FastAPI only registers routes that exist at the time include_router is called, so all new routes returned 404.

issues: Shows 'Rs. 0' label instead of formatted NPR - minor display cosmetic

rca_of_issue.root_cause: In server.py, `app.include_router(api_router)` was placed at line 1041 inside the startup event section. The new feature routes (vehicle photos, legal documents, spare parts, website sync) were all defined AFTER this line (lines 1049-1259). FastAPI's include_router snapshots the routes at the time of the call, so subsequently defined routes on api_router are not registered.
rca_of_issue.fix_applied: Removed app.include_router(api_router) from line 1041 and added it at the end of the file (after all route definitions at line 1259+). Also moved app.mount('/uploads', ...) to the same location.
rca_of_issue.verification: All 12/13 backend tests pass, 1 remaining test (get_vehicle_photos) was a timing issue - passes on rerun

critical_code_review_comments: Route ordering issue was the primary critical bug - fixed. app.include_router must always be at END of server.py after all route definitions.

The /api/spare-parts/summary route is defined after /api/spare-parts/{pid} (PUT/DELETE/POST adjust-stock). Since there's no GET /spare-parts/{pid} route, FastAPI correctly routes GET /spare-parts/summary to the summary handler without conflict.
seed_data_creation: None - cleanup test removed all TEST_ prefixed spare parts
context_for_next_testing_agent: Critical bug fixed: app.include_router was before route definitions. All 6 new features working: Spare Parts CRUD (/spare-parts), Vehicle Photos section on VehicleDetail, Legal Documents section on VehicleDetail, Marketing AI caption + Website Sync (Export/Download/Push to hamroauto), Finance page showing financial summary cards.
